name: Helios Launch
description: Internal analytics portal for product telemetry and growth experiments.

history.note: Project kickoff; defined MVP scope and success metrics.
MVP dashboard demo with session and funnel charts.

current_state: MVP dashboard live with auth; ETL ingests daily batch via Airflow prototype.
next_steps: Set up query caching and downsampling

name: Alice Kim
how_we_know: Partnered on the Helios Launch analytics portal.
key_facts: Enjoys whiteboard sessions with clear visual artifacts
communication_style: Email for decisions and longer summaries

history.note: Helios kickoff; aligned on success metrics
Reviewed MVP dashboard and prioritized cohort retention

title: Database choice for Helios
decision: Standardize on Postgres for both OLTP and phase-1 analytics.
reasoning: Postgres provides JSONB for semi-structured events, strong ecosystem, and minimal operational overhead for MVP.
outcome: Adopted Postgres 16 with Timescale extension for time-series; to monitor growth and revisit when thresholds are met.
revisit: 2026-06-01 or when daily event volume exceeds 50M

overview: Foundations for applied ML in product analytics and experimentation.

key_concepts.explanation: Mapping predicted probabilities to observed frequencies.
Tracking user retention by cohort to infer product value.

notes: Favor simple, explainable models for stakeholder trust; guard against leakage in temporal splits.
questions: Best baseline for churn prediction with sparse events?
How to calibrate probabilities under class imbalance?

overview: Common product growth metrics and how to interpret them.

key_concepts.explanation: Single metric representing delivered value (e.g., weekly active teams).
Share of signups who reach first value moment.
Cohort-based measure of ongoing value and habit formation.

notes: Define metrics with unambiguous, queryable events; document edge cases.
questions: How to align activation with technical instrumentation?
What sampling is acceptable for near-real-time dashboards?

notes_on_specific.title: Accelerate
